parsed_output.justification: Paul explicitly admits, 'I was a werewolf,' although he immediately attempts to shift the current role to Mitchell by claiming a Troublemaker switch occurred. While Justin claims to have switched Paul and Mitchell, Paul's admission of the starting role makes him the most suspicious player, whether he is the Werewolf attempting to deflect or the Tanner attempting to be eliminated.
